assertion_results.text: outputs/api-claim-verification.md contains a reference to the GitHub REST API endpoint PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number}/reviews/{review_id} or equivalent evidence that the claim is incorrect
assertion_results.evidence: Line 20 contains the exact endpoint: '**`PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number}/reviews/{review_id}`**' and line 14 states 'The claim is **incorrect**. The GitHub REST API **does** support updating a submitted pull request review.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/api-claim-verification.md contains suggested corrected language for the Requirement
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 34-38 contain a 'Suggested correction' section with a replacement requirement row: '| Update existing eval review when a new run completes, or create a new review if none exists | Use `PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number}/reviews/{review_id}` to update an existing review | Yes |'.
